text: OpenAI closed their latest funding round with **$122 billion** in committed capital at a post money valuation of **$852 billion**!

Version 3 has been released of **[RoboManipBaselines](https://isri-aist.github.io/RoboManipBaselines-ProjectPage/)**: Build, train, and deploy robot manipulation policies across real and simulated environments. [[Code](https://github.com/isri-aist/RoboManipBaselines)] [[Paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2509.17057)] [[Datasets](https://huggingface.co/RoboManipBaselines)].

text: This GTC '26 session explores how NVIDIA's Alpamayo--particularly reasoning vision-language-action models (VLA)--enable vehicles to interpret, reason about, and navigate complex real-world scenarios with greater humanlike understanding.

preview.title: From Research to Production: How Alpamayo Accelerates Autonomous Vehicle Development S81779 | GTC San Jose 2026 | NVIDIA On-Demand
preview.description: Discover the latest advancements in end-to-end autonomous driving as the industry accelerates toward scalable, Level 4 AI-driven systems

text:
How [Ilia Larchenko](https://huggingface.co/IliaLarchenko) et al. trained a robot to do 50 household tasks in simulation by building upon the [$\pi_{0.5}$](https://www.pi.website/blog/pi05) VLA architecture [[Code](https://github.com/IliaLarchenko/behavior-1k-solution)] [[Paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.06951)] [[Video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=J4wpO0EdCZs)]

NVIDIA's [Openpi Comet](https://github.com/mli0603/openpi-comet) came in second place, but they were able to push performance significantly higher on the public validation set after the fact.

preview.title: Winning the BEHAVIOR-1K Challenge (NeurIPS 2025)
preview.description: Can one robotics model trained via Imitation Learning solve 50 household tasks?

text: New AGI benchmark dropped! 🚀

preview.title: ARC-AGI-3
preview.description: ARC-AGI-3 is the first interactive reasoning benchmark for AI agents—play as humans and build agents that learn in novel environments.

preview.title: Will World Models Allow Robots to Think?
preview.description: A brief review of the technology powering a new generation of intelligent robots

text: **Dream2Flow**, a framework that bridges video generation and robotic control through 3D object flow as an intermediate representation. This method reconstructs 3D object motions from generated videos and formulates manipulation as object trajectory tracking.
Looks like TRI is building an open source VLA training framework.

preview.title: TRI Develops VLA Framework for Robotic Manipulation | Toyota Research Institute posted on the topic | LinkedIn
preview.description: TRI is developing a framework to train Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models for robotic manipulation. As we are working towards sharing this framework with the community, we have been testing on a variety of sim and real tasks. Stay tuned!

text: Here is [Cheng Chi](https://cheng-chi.github.io/)'s guest lecture from [Oier Mees](https://www.oiermees.com/) Robot Learning [course](https://cvg.ethz.ch/lectures/Robot-Learning/) at ETHZ (2026) on **Robotics Beyond Algorithms**. In this talk he covers practical tips and tricks of building real-world robotic systems.

preview.title: Cheng Chi: Robotics Beyond Algorithms [ETHZ Robot Learning 2026]
